welcome.title: Welcome to ORGII
welcome.description: Let's configure your workspace in a few quick steps.

devPassport.title: Set up Dev Passport
devPassport.description: Every vibe engineer needs an identity.

github.title: Connect GitHub
github.description: Connect your GitHub account to access repos, create commits, and manage pull requests directly from ORGII.
github.hint: You can also connect GitHub later from Settings > Integrations

workspace.title: Open a Workspace
workspace.description: Open a local folder or clone a repo to start working. ORGII will automatically index your codebase for intelligent code assistance.
workspace.hint: You can skip this step and open a workspace later

theme.title: Choose Your Theme
theme.description: Select a theme that suits your preference. You can change this anytime in Settings.

complete.title: You're All Set!
complete.description: Your workspace is ready. Start a new session to begin coding with AI assistance, or explore the app to discover all features.
